description: Paperclip issue templates for execution consistency.

templates.descriptionTemplate:
## Objective
<what this campaign is intended to achieve>

## Hypothesis
<testable assumption and why it should work>

## Audience
<segment, region, and context>

## Manifesto Mapping
- Compassion: <yes/no + rationale>
- Dignity: <yes/no + rationale>
- Stewardship: <yes/no + rationale>
- Transparency: <yes/no + rationale>

## KPI Target
<metric, baseline, target, timeline>

## Experiment Design
<variants, sample, stop rules>

## Evidence
<link to source docs/dashboards>

## Organization Profile
<sector, relevance, trust profile>

## Value Thesis
<why this partner is strategic>

## Offer Structure
<pilot terms, expected outcomes>

## Risk Review
<reputational/legal/operational risks>

## Required Approvals
<who must sign off>

## Next Action
<single immediate action with owner and deadline>

## User Story
<as a ... I need ... so that ...>

## Acceptance Criteria
- <criteria 1>
- <criteria 2>

## Threat Model
<abuse vectors and mitigations>

## Observability
<logs, metrics, alerts, SLO impact>

## Rollout Plan
<staged launch + rollback path>

## Research Question
<precise question being answered>

## Methods
<methodology and data collection protocol>

## Source Quality
<source classes and inclusion criteria>

## Uncertainty and Limits
<what cannot be concluded>

## Publication Plan
<target outlet and timeline>

## Reporting Scope
<period and systems covered>

## Metrics Included
<list with definitions>

## Source References
<link every claim to evidence>

## Caveats
<known limitations and confidence level>

## Correction Policy
<how errors are disclosed and fixed>
